name: Turbo Takedown
short_description: An infinite runner driving game where collisions are rewarded!  Take out enemies and dodge hazards as you travel through six different biomes and chase the highest score.
detailed_description:
You live hard and drive fast. When you need to get somewhere, collateral damage is not your concern.

Take control of your beloved Big Blue, and go further than ever before.

  • Lane-locked controls means precision dodging.

  • A powerful pneumatic suspension enables big-air jumps.

  • Heavy armor makes you invulnerable to most collisions.

  • No brakes suggests you are not afraid of commitment.

  • Great power brings significant fuel consumption.

This will be a fun, fast ride through six distinctly-styled biomes, but honestly you might be too busy to notice.
